name: Hydroid
description: Hydroid summons the power of the ocean depths. He provides crowd control with aqueous attacks. His enemies will meet a watery demise.
passiveDescription: Enemies damaged by Hydroid are more vulnerable to <DT_CORROSIVE_COLOR>Corrosive Status, with initial Status reducing Armor by |PCT|%.

abilities.name: Tempest Barrage
abilities.description: Summon a tempest to rain down upon a target area.

abilities.name: Tidal Surge
abilities.description: Crash through enemies in a ferocious wall of water.

abilities.name: Plunder
abilities.description: Plunder Armor from nearby enemies and increase <DT_CORROSIVE_COLOR>Corrosive Damage on your Abilities and weapons. Enemies affected by <DT_CORROSIVE_COLOR>Corrosive Status offer a greater increase.

abilities.name: Tentacle Swarm
abilities.description: Summon a creature from the depths. Its watery tentacles emerge from nearby surfaces to wreak havoc.
